identityProviderId.title: Identity provider
identityProviderId.description: Upstream OIDC provider this notifier federates to.

resourceAudience.title: Resource audience
resourceAudience.description: Downstream resource/audience indicator for the resource server hosting the consent authorization_details schema. Sent as the 'audience' parameter on bc-authorize whenever configured (the provider's resource-indicator name, e.g. Auth0 — not RFC 8707 'resource'). clientId/secret/endpoints/scope come from the linked OIDC identity provider.

callbackClientId.title: Callback client id
callbackClientId.description: AM client used to authenticate the callback POST

consentRelayStrategy.title: Consent relay strategy
consentRelayStrategy.description: How the authorization_details is relayed to the IdP: transform to an Auth0 user-profile URN for display, or pass through unchanged.
